---
id: get-devices
title: "List Devices"
description: "Get a list of devices under the specified space. It supports pagination and filtering conditions."
sidebar_label: "List Devices"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Devices"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a list of devices under the specified space. It supports pagination and filtering conditions.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"Access token obtained via authorization."},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"App ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"Key ID assigned when creating an application on the [Aqara Developer Platform](https://developer.aqara.com)."},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"Random string, should be different for each request."},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"Request timestamp in milliseconds."},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"Request signature. For information on how to generate the signature, please refer to [Sign Generation Rules](https://opendoc.aqara.com/en/docs/developmanual/apiIntroduction/signGenerationRules.html)."},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"Language, defaults to English. Supports 'zh' and 'en'."},{"name":"spaceIds","in":"query","description":"Space ID list. Example: spaceIds=xx1,xx2 or spaceIds=xx1&spaceIds=xx2. If empty, all devices will be queried.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"needChildren","in":"query","description":"Whether to query devices under the child spaces. This parameter is only effective when spaceIds is not empty.","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}},{"name":"state","in":"query","description":"Device online status. <ul><li>true: Query online devices.</li><li>false: Query offline devices.</li><li>Not set: Do not filter by status.</li></ul>","required":false,"schema":{"type":"boolean","nullable":true}},{"name":"deviceTypesList","in":"query","description":"Device type list. Example: deviceTypesList=light,switch or deviceTypesList=light&deviceTypesList=switch","required":false,"schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"deviceName","in":"query","description":"Device name fuzzy matching (case-insensitive, blank values are automatically ignored)","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"orderBy","in":"query","description":"Sorting method. <ul><li><code>createTime asc</code>: Sorts results by creation time in ascending order (oldest first).</li><li><code>createTime desc</code>: Sorts results by creation time in descending order (newest first).</li></ul>","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"name":"pageNum","in":"query","description":"Page number","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":1},{"name":"pageSize","in":"query","description":"Number of devices per page","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer"},"example":200}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  label={undefined}

success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"Total number of devices that meet the conditions","example":3},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page number","example":1},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page size","example":200},"data":{"type":"array","description":"List of devices on the current
